message:
Running command: 
# Check if docs/pnr directory was created and log started
ls -la /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/docs/pnr/ 2>/dev/null || echo "docs/pnr not created yet"

# Check the run is actually going  
RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
ls -la "$RUN_DIR/" | grep -E "^d" | sort -t'-' -k1 -n | tail -10
